_note: ROUND 3 great-grandparents for batch d_800_1400_3: parents of the round-2 grandparent nodes (R2F_/R2G_/R2L_). Documented lines only. Convergence handled: Berengaria of León reuses EXISTING ALFONSOIXLEON+BERENGARIA; Maria of Brabant's mother reuses EXISTING R2F_ADELAIDE_BURGUNDY (=Adelaide of Burgundy d.1273, dau of Hugh IV, already in 41_grandparents_d3); Charles II of Naples reuses EXISTING CHARLESANJOU; Beatrice of Castile reuses EXISTING ALFONSOX. New nodes use R3D_ prefix. SKIPPED: R2L_MARGARETDECLARE_MONTIFEX (no documented/agreed parents; WikiTree/Geni sources conflict).
